steps.title: Block the main shape
steps.description: Lightly sketch a square or short rectangle for the main wall of the cottage. Place it slightly off-center on the page rather than dead middle.

steps.title: Add the roof
steps.description: Add a triangle on top of the rectangle for the pitched roof. The triangle's peak doesn't have to sit dead center — a slight offset gives the cottage character.

steps.title: Block doors and windows
steps.description: Sketch a tall rectangle for the door (toward one side, not centered) and two square windows. Use simple shapes — you'll refine them later.

steps.title: Refine outlines
steps.description: Trace the cottage outline with confident straight lines. Long edges are smoother when you draw from the shoulder. Make sure the roof line meets the wall corners cleanly.

steps.title: Detail the door and windows
steps.description: Add a doorknob, a cross of lines for window panes, and a small step in front of the door. Keep these details simple.

steps.title: Add character
steps.description: Add a chimney on the roof, a few roof shingle lines, and maybe a small flower box under one window. Add detail in one or two spots, not everywhere — let other parts stay quiet.
